geopolitics.description: The US president says he is ‘shocked at her’, delivering a blunt public rebuke to one of his closest European allies.

geopolitics.title: North Korea showing 'serious ability' over nuclear weapon
geopolitics.description: North Korea is showing a "very serious increase" in its ability to produce nuclear weapons, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency has said.

geopolitics.description: BEIJING (Sputnik) - Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov said on Wednesday that Russia can fill the energy shortfall in China and other interested countries caused by the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

geopolitics.title: US eases sanctions on Venezuela central bank

geopolitics.title: Oil prices mixed due to Middle East supply uncertainty
geopolitics.description: Oil prices were mixed today with Brent futures up and US futures down amid uncertainty over crude supply from the key Middle East producing region as the Strait of Hormuz remains mainly shut.

geopolitics.title: EU cautious not to rush release of funds to Hungary
geopolitics.description: The EU should not be too hasty in releasing frozen funds for Hungary after last week's vote, European lawmakers said on April 14, warning it should wait for prime minister-elect Peter Magyar to implement concrete reforms.
